description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named tests that runs on pull requests to branches 18.0* and on pushes to branches 18.0 and 18.0-ocabot-*. The workflow has two jobs: Detect unreleased dependencies on ubuntu-latest and a matrix of tests on ubuntu-22.04 with different containers and names. The test job uses a postgres service, sets up environment variables, checks out the code, installs addons and dependencies, checks licenses and development status, initializes a test db, runs tests, and uploads code coverage and optionally updates .pot files.
